name: Turtles
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay out a sheet of silicon paper (candy will stick to waxed paper).
2. Place 2 pecan halves side by side, repeating the pairs across and down the sheet.
3. Spoon melted caramel on each pair.
4. When the caramel sets, drop the candy top-down into the melted chocolate.
5. Lift the candy out of the chocolate and put it bottom-down onto the silicon paper.
6. When set, place the turtle in a candy cup.
7. If there is leftover chocolate coating, stir and spoon some mixture into the candy cups. You can add nuts, cereal, or Chinese noodles for variety.
Tips for using candy coating:
1. Melt in a double boiler or microwave (never more than 2 minutes—check and stir every 15 seconds).
2. Avoid getting water or steam into the candy coating, as it will turn solid.
3. For a richer taste, use 1 lb. of candy coating and 1/4 lb of real chocolate.
